changelog:
v2.6.0 — Reading time, QR codes, review reminders, preview links

  • Single entries now show estimated reading time and an auto-generated Table of Contents (entries with 3+ headings)
  • New "QR Code" sidebar in the post editor — download a PNG to print on table tents
  • "Last Reviewed" column and dashboard widget for stale entries (12-month threshold)
  • Generate a 7-day public preview link for draft entries — share with reviewers without giving them an admin login

v2.5.0

  • Print footer uses the site name automatically
  • Wizard defaults to Draft instead of Published
  • Editing an entry in the Wizard now warns about overwriting hand-edits
  • "Edit in Wizard" button on success screen
  • Editors can now see Search Analytics and Content Gaps
  • Public feedback widget no longer shows raw vote counts
  • Category filter button counts removed (avoid stale numbers after a search)
  • Hub URL configurable via ptk_hub_slug option / ptk_hub_url filter
  • Glossary empty state speaks to visitors instead of pointing them at admin tools
  • Starter Content importer stays visible after first run

v2.4.0

  • Council entries auto-share to every school site by default
  • One-click "Sync all entries now" button on the Network Sync page

v2.2.1

  • Auto-updater: update the plugin from WordPress admin with one click
  • Smart search: autocomplete dropdown, typo tolerance, phrase matching, recency boost, popularity ranking
